twitter_thread: 7 out of 10 small businesses use AI tools that don't integrate with their workflow.
Zapier automates 250+ LinkedIn video content tasks per month for a typical small business.
Paycom's AI-powered payroll tool saves $1,200/yr compared to Gusto for a 10-employee business.
The top 9 AI tools for small business save 12 hours/week, equivalent to $6,000/yr in labor costs.
Avoid AI tools with generic 'solutions' - focus on workflow-specific tools like Automator.
Mailchimp's AI-powered email tool saves 4 hours/week for a small business with 1,000 subscribers.
What's the most time-saving AI tool you've implemented in your business? #aiinsmallbusiness #productivity
